name: How do I file a workers comp claim after warehouse injury in West Valley City?
description: Report to employer ASAP, complete First Report, get authorized care—Utah/Idaho processes start there[1][6].

mainEntity.name: How do I file a workers comp claim after warehouse injury in West Valley City?

acceptedAnswer.text: Report to employer ASAP, complete First Report, get authorized care—Utah/Idaho processes start there[1][6].
acceptedAnswer.description: **Notify employer immediately, help complete First Report of Injury, and request benefits formally.** In Utah, ensure Form 122 reaches the Labor Commission; Idaho requires prompt employer filing[1][6]. **Key factors:** Verbal/written notice ASAP; employer files within 7 days; follow with medical from approved provider. **Practical guidance:** Document incident in email, attend all treatments, avoid unauthorized doctors to prevent denials. Track communications. **Filing correctly unlocks medical and wage benefits.**
